nasb.text: So David did not take the ark with him to the city of David, but took it aside to the house of Obed-edom the Gittite.

esv.text: So David did not take the ark home into the city of David, but took it aside to the house of Obed-edom the Gittite.

cnv.text: 所以，大衛沒有把約櫃運到大衛城他自己那裡去，卻轉運到迦特人俄別．以東的家裡去。

ccb.text: 因此，大卫没有将约柜运到大卫城，而是把它运到迦特人俄别·以东家。
